candidate_definitions.text: A Fast and Tightly-coupled Sparse-Direct LiDAR-Inertial-Visual Odometry (LIVO).

- **3 July 2024**: We are excited to announce the upcoming release of [**FAST-LIVO2**](https://github.com/hku-mars/FAST-LIVO2) (some high-resolution results are already showcased). This new version delivers a **overwhelming enhancement** over **FAST-LIVO**, establishing an **und…
